module.name: native
module.purpose: Defines folder-organized native tool type stubs. Native tools implement the ordinary Tool trait directly, expose static ToolPreview metadata, and are aggregated by NATIVE_TOOL_LIST plus PRIMARY_NATIVE_TOOL_LIST.

childModules.name: file
childModules.purpose: Owns file-system native Tool implementation stubs and ToolPreview metadata.

childModules.name: image
childModules.purpose: Owns native image inspection and transformation Tool implementation stubs and ToolPreview metadata.

childModules.name: network
childModules.purpose: Owns native HTTP request and DNS lookup Tool implementation stubs and ToolPreview metadata.

childModules.name: package
childModules.purpose: Owns native package metadata query Tool implementation stubs and ToolPreview metadata.

childModules.name: shell
childModules.purpose: Owns native shell command execution Tool implementation stubs and ToolPreview metadata.

childModules.name: system
childModules.purpose: Owns native system, process, and environment inspection Tool implementation stubs and ToolPreview metadata.
